updates.title: May 8, 2026
updates.body:
They fuded at the bottom, but who defended at the bottom? To learn more, modifications made to finances.trollrunner.net (TrollDeaths, Fud Mode [fud tweets skeleton emoji], Guardian Mode [defender emoji [angel emoji]).
Small bug persists will come back to it.
Work around my garden and took lots of pics. To see what the troll gardener is going to be up to, head to blog.trollrunner.net -> Garden

updates.title: May 4, 2026
updates.body:
May the 4th be with you my fellow trolls! 44 new stickers added in Chino Hills and Rancho Cucamonga, California, were added today.
Minor scroll bar issue fixed.
Bullet points and numbering were added for reading "Latest Updates" for better reading.
Working on improving fonts and backgrounds...

updates.title: April 29, 2026
updates.body: More styling on front page. 13 new stickers added giving it a total of 112. Blogs page has been improved. I look forward to you reading and interacting with it! Projects page has been modified (Project 001: "U MAD BRO ?") is still in progress...⏳⏳⏳
